choices: Does Moe take babysitting Maggie too far
Moe is happy and only babysits when Lisa isn't able to babysit
Moe watches Maggie whenever Homer is drunk at his bar
1.content:
Ugh. Ah, no point in moping around. I might as well join them and have a jolly old time. Ha. Oh, better set the alarm. Here I am, one of the crowd.

I'm comfortable, I'm calm. Anybody looks at me, I got a hypodermic full of bleach. Uh, people, we are officially over capacity. We gotta kick one person out. Someone who's alone, already bitter... someone who's been trampled on so many times... one more won't make any...

Oh, Moe. Yeah, that's me, all right. Sorry, Moe. Either walk out with dignity or I push you down this muddy hill. I'd prefer that you push me... seeing how I'm desperate for any human contact. All right. Thanks a lot. Ah! The flower's starting to open.

Everyone, flare your nostrils in olfactory anticipation. Oh, man. The plant cut one. Bart, plants don't... Whew! Ay-ay-ay! Unh! That smells worse than James Coco's ski boots. No way I got something that’s a better comparison, and what might that be Bart. Omg Lisa yes Bart do you know what I’m talking about, o yeah yes I do Bart. It’s Maggie’s diaper and now her pull up when she poops in it pee-yew. Oh, yeah. That's mildly better. Listen to those lucky people enjoying that pretty flower. I got nothing. Just this can. Ha. At least there's someone worse off than me. So long, suckers.


D'oh! Well, at least we're outside instead of sitting at home watching TV. I hear that. Hey, that car has a TV in it. Man We now return to The Beverly Hillbillies Down Under. Hey, Granny. I'm gonna be a professional didgeridoo player. Well, now it's a didgeri-don't.

Oh, Granny. Can you put on the baseball game? My kids are watching a movie. Oh, come on. Help a brother out. Oh, why don't you call my secretary and make an appointment, brother? A dream deferred is a dream denied.

Dad, the traffic's moving. Huh? Whoo-hoo! Pedal to the metal. My toddler! Your toddler! No! Well, this is it. The last call for Moe. Ah, God. Wha...? Moe, thank God you saved my toddler. That hideous man is a hero. Ha. Life don't seem so hard no more. Maggie's in the paper with Moe. How cute. Ah! Look at those pants.

They're standing up with no one in them. The door bell rings hey, I was in the neighborhood... and, uh, thought I'd, you know, check in on Maggie. Moe, I'm glad you're here. I wanted to thank you so much for saving my toddler.


So I knitted you a nice warm sweater. Oh, look at that. That's so soft and thoughtful and... What's the gag? Is it full of chiggers? No, no. All that's in there is love and gratitude. Aw, jeez, there's something in my eye. Oh, it's just some glass. So how's the little tyke doing? Ain't she adorable? Oh, my God, I'm late for work. How you got in my carpool, I'll never know. The Swedish are coming!

The Swedish are coming! Oh, Lord, why do they keep changing his medication? Look at me, I'm Speedy Alka Seltzer. Whoa! Moe, I gotta handle this. Can you keep an eye on Maggie? Me? Uh, yeah. Sure. If you don't think I'd spook her or nothing. No, you'll be fine. I'll be right back.
1.title: Moe shows up at the Simpson's house

choices: He actually didn't care about favorites as long he could help Homer stay in his
13.content: Since Marge tries to get Homer to watch Maggie, Homer takes Maggie to Moe's. Once at Moe's Moe insists that he'll watch Maggie, because she's not the first one Moe has had to watch while Homer drank beer. Who did Moe like to watch for Homer more when they were Maggie's age?
13.title: Moe watches Maggie whenever Homer is drunk at h...

info.brief_description: While Moe is trying to jump off the bridge he accidentally saves Maggie's life.
info.description: Moe tries to jump off the bridge but just as he's ready he accidentally catches Maggie in his arms
